recentActivity.summary: Multi-agent GID-hardening orchestration complete. CatalogSmith refactored 3 scripts to GID-first (third pagination bug also caught and fixed). Shopkeeper resolved maple-pecan SKU collision. 79 duplicate-SKU situations / 83 phantom products mapped catalog-wide.
Website-sheet nutrition ingest orchestration complete. 425/425 Shopify Metafield writes succeeded across 71 products. Test SKU 31009L (Justin's spot-check) now renders full FDA panel.

Bug-fix orchestration complete. CatalogSmith root-caused 3 compounding bugs in Phase 1 nutrition extract (pagination cap + 67 duplicate rows + 49 missing sibling rows). Master nutrition coverage 41 → 121 webproducts. Zero new Shopify writes warranted — live and master now in sync.
Multi-agent catalog-sync orchestration complete. ThemeSmith → CatalogSmith chain delivered 172/172 Shopify Metafield writes (88 ingredients + 84 inulin), 0 failures, all verified post-write.

Built gw-inbox (read-only listing) and gw-sweep (drain inboxes by invoking each agent) to fill the gap where 'tell every agent to check its inbox' had no one-shot command. Also fattened comment-based help on every gateway PS function so semantics are self-documenting.

Orchestrated CatalogSmith catalog-sync (ingredients + nutrition). Background-spawned subprocess directly (bypassed gateway.py 300s timeout). CatalogSmith returned partial: nutrition extracted (41/159), ingredients diff complete, Shopify writes blocked on PDP-key scope decision.
Fixed all-agents PS function — detection regex was matching powershell.exe wrappers and WindowsTerminal.exe in addition to claude.exe, causing false-positive 'already running' skips after agent /exit

Migrated Creative Library ownership Crowley/DataOps -> AdSmith via two inbox dispatches. AdSmith moved script + declared ownership; DataOps repointed cron + cleaned migration wording. agent-team.json task 13 closed.
OneDrive 'Marketing and eCommerce' path remap — 58/58 live files updated, 774 occurrences replaced (35 JSON-escaped + 737 plain-bs + 2 forward-slash). Verified zero leftovers; smoke tests pass.

Dispatched CatalogSmith to collect Shopify nutrition metafields + export shareable xlsx to OneDrive. Inbox task queued (6f6232be-8a30-4a71-a5e2-7f3184bcaaad); gateway subprocess timed out at 300s. Task still valid in CatalogSmith inbox — awaits interactive pickup.

lastActivity.summary: Audit-logic GID-first hardening + catalog-wide duplicate-SKU scan — 79 dup-SKU situations / 83 phantoms mapped; gaps report cleared 31007L; Catalog Browser pushed (73ee9c5); shared _shopify_gid.py helper landed.

recentActivity.summary: OneDrive Website FDA-panel ingest complete — 425/425 Shopify nutrition Metafield writes succeeded and verified across 71 product_ids; 31009L PDP nutrition now renders end-to-end (29/30 fields); master + live in sync.

Populated custom.tab_content.ingredients (rich_text_field) on 4 Latte products in Shopify from their Latte-specific spec sheet PDFs. Verified live. Fixed a pagination bug in enrich_catalog_from_shopify.py that was silently truncating metafield fetches at default limit=50 and hiding ingredients on rich products (75-100+ metafields). Master + spec-sheet PDFs + catalog browser all re-deployed.

BUG FIXED: Phase 1 nutrition extract pagination cap (default limit=50) silently truncated 66/107 webproducts. Master nutrition coverage 41 -> 121 webproducts (+80 SKUs). Test SKU 83110L + siblings 63110/83116/53110 now have full FDA panels (17 nutrients each). Zero new Shopify writes warranted (master perfectly in sync with live post-fix).

Defined custom.bundle_contents + custom.bundle_value_total_cents; populated bundle_contents on Mother's Day Gift Box with 4 product references. One flag: 'SKU 9003' in the task is not a real SKU — resolved to canonical Frother SKU 90037.

Phase 3 EXECUTE complete: 88 ingredient writes (tab_content.ingredients) + 84 inulin writes (custom.inulin) = 172/172 Shopify writes succeeded, 0 failures, 172/172 verified post-write. Master inulin backfilled 110 SKUs from OneDrive historical xlsx. Caffeine_mg backfill not possible — Teeccino is caffeine-free.

Per-SKU ingredient resolution overhaul: Shopify metafields now drive ingredients on spec sheets and catalog browser when they're stronger evidence than the flavor-grain PDF. Tiered priority: Shopify long-form > matched-style PDF > Shopify headers > PDF fallback. Fixes the 31008L corruption issue Justin caught and the broader format-mismatch class (Latte SKU getting Coffee PDF data, Instant Coffee getting ground PDF data, etc).

Nutrition extracted to master (41/159 webproducts populated; 118 OCR gaps). Ingredients diff complete, 7 master rows backfilled from live. Shopify ingredient writes BLOCKED — no canonical custom.ingredients Metafield exists; Justin must pick PDP target key.

Caught corrupted Sales source PDF while answering 'do we have catalog info for SKU 31008L French Roast Latte family'. PDF 'Instant Miraculous Mushroom Adapt & Protect Latte Specification 1.pdf' has its internal Product Name edited to say 'Instant French Roast Latte' but its body still contains Mushroom A&P ingredients. Pipeline was routing this corrupted content to 31008L. Resolver hardened with filename-token tie-breaker and Instant-Coffee fallback rule. Re-ran extract+backfill+regen+catalog-deploy. 31008L now sources from the legitimate 'Teeccino Instant French Roast Latte Specification 1.pdf'.

Audit-logic hardened (GID-first matching across 3 scripts + new shared helper); 79 duplicate-SKU situations / 83 phantom products mapped; gaps report + Catalog Browser regenerated; 31007L cleared from gaps and rendering correctly.

Catalog Browser Phase 3: wired the new master + _spec_sheet_labs spec-sheet data into the hosted catalog at jstnadler.github.io/teeccino-reports/catalog.html. Each product drawer now has a Product Specification section. Master xlsx is now the single source of truth for both PDFs and the catalog browser.

projects.name: ADA Compliance / Replo
projects.description: Website ADA compliance updates using Replo page builder modules. Almost done — finishing remaining pages.

projects.name: Agent Team Deployment
projects.description: Deploy multi-agent team with separate Discord bots. Each agent gets its own Discord bot, workspace, and isolated channel access. Orchestration rules route tasks to the right agent automatically.

projects.name: Amazon Sponsored Brand Video
projects.description: Video ad for Amazon Sponsored Brand Video placement. Script drafted, needs shot list and filming.

projects.name: Versatility Campaign (One Flavor, Four Ways)
projects.description: Paid media push telling Teeccino's versatility story — 4 hero flavors (French Roast, Adapt & Protect, Dandelion Dark Roast, Mocha) × 4 formats (Full-Grind Coffee / Tee-Bags / Maya Instant Coffee / Maya Instant Latte). 16 SKUs in scope. $15K over 31 days (2026-05-04 → 2026-06-03), Meta 80% / Google 20%. Budget reallocated from Meta COLD. KPI: account-level MER floor ≥ 6.0x. Inaugural test of AdSmith's campaign-planning skill — first Teeccino campaign tracked end-to-end as a project (brief → creative → launch → optimize → post-mortem).

projects.name: CatalogSmith Deployment (PIM Agent)
projects.description: Deploy CatalogSmith as the 7th guild agent — the Product Information Management (PIM) steward. Owns metafield/metaobject schemas, taxonomy (families, styles, tags), and product copy (titles, descriptions, SEO, flavor notes, nutrition, brew methods, ingredients). Writes catalog fields to Shopify directly; Shopkeeper retains operational writes (promos, pricing, inventory, publish). Phased rollout: 0) Bootstrap → 1) Extract live Shopify catalog into master xlsx → 2) First completeness audit → 3) Fill gaps → 4) Copy pass w/ brand voice → 5) Syndication-ready exports (Amazon, wholesale).

projects.name: CoffeeAlternatives.com Launch & Autonomous Operation
projects.description: Launch and operate CoffeeAlternatives.com — a quietly Teeccino-owned editorial site that SEO-targets AI-answer queries in the coffee-alternatives space. Full rebuild from legacy static HTML to Jekyll + GitHub Actions. BrewSmith (8th guild agent) operates autonomously: daily content generation, community nurture, SEO audits, traffic monitoring. Ownership transparent on /disclosure/; body copy editorial and balanced.

projects.name: Cost Tracking & Profit Waterfall
projects.description: Track virtual CC costs (Meta, Google, Internet Tools cards), Shopify billing, and build profit waterfall from gross to contribution margin.

projects.name: Data Pipeline Audit & Fix
projects.description: Fix timezone mismatch and status filter bugs in SKU sales scripts that cause ~9% data inflation in KPIs. Affects Daily SKU Sales report and downstream matrices.

projects.name: Influencer Gifting Program
projects.description: Scalable gifting program — send curated boxes to micro-influencers, track ROI on organic social content. Creator discovery pipeline running daily.

projects.name: Upgrade to New Customer Accounts
projects.description: Migrate Teeccino from Shopify CLASSIC customer accounts to NEW customer accounts. Primary driver: unlocks Stay.ai's Shopify Customer Account Extensions (no-code app blocks in Theme Editor → Checkout and customer accounts), giving subscribers richer in-page subscription management (skip/pause/gift/swap) without leaving /account. Secondary benefits: Shop-account integration (passwordless login, saved payment, faster checkout), official Shopify support roadmap (classic is legacy). Cost: changes the entire customer-account UX, needs coordination on email templates, any other theme touchpoints referencing /account routes, and a merchant-side switch in Shopify Admin → Settings → Customer accounts. Non-urgent — the current classic-accounts + Liquid CTA to Stay.ai portal (shipped 2026-04-17) works fine.

projects.name: New Packaging Rollover
projects.description: Full rollover of all Teeccino products to new packaging. Consolidates carousel-image-sync and website-photo-update. AssetSmith owns the master Assets library and routes designer deliverables into Shopkeeper's Carousel\NEW PACKAGE folders. Shopkeeper owns upload-to-Shopify. 175 products tracked in New Packaging.xlsx across 7 carousel image slots each.

projects.name: PDP ATC Donation Upsell Popup
projects.description: Build a minimally-invasive, ADA-compliant upsell modal that triggers on Add-to-Cart on the new pdp-rebuild template (now live on 85 products). First upsell offer is NOT a Teeccino product — it's an NGO donation using the existing Shopify donation product that already powers the checkout donation upsell flow. Goal: add the donation variant to cart with one click, dismiss with one click, no interference with OCU / cart drawer / Stay.ai / Loox. Session-scoped suppression so repeat ATCs on the same session don't re-nag. WCAG 2.1 AA required. Justin is offline for the build — expects near-complete with a preview URL to QA and flip to live tonight.

projects.name: PDP Rebuild (Replo → Native Liquid)
projects.description: Rebuild the main Replo product detail page (template 10dc3372) as a native Liquid section in the teeccino-dawn-refresh theme. 99 products use this template. Goal: eliminate Replo dependency so ThemeSmith can directly maintain, update, and optimize PDPs. Scope is bound to live-page functionality only (see pdp-live-spec.md) — Replo-chunk features not present on the live page are dropped. Secondary: rebuild 3 other Replo templates (15 products total) after main template is complete.

projects.name: Promo Calendar Management
projects.description: Ongoing management of the Teeccino promotional calendar. Includes planning Earth Day sale, monthly FOTM changeovers, and coordinating with promo management system.

projects.name: Promo Management System
projects.description: End-to-end promo lifecycle: inventory analysis, metafield updates, discount creation/deactivation, collection management, and performance tracking.

projects.name: Worldwide Botanicals Amazon
projects.description: Add Amazon purchase buttons to Worldwide Botanicals product pages. Waiting on Wendy to send product listings for review.
